station_name: Hindustan Petroleum Baxis Singh and Co.
station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Road, Mumbai - Agra National Hwy, next to Kalpana Cinema Hall, Friends Colony, Kurla West, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text: Worst of the worst customer service ever. No sense of how to talk to a customer. They speak like thugs and give bad words. Even the women workers are the same, seems like they were hired from the streets. Zero sense of communication with anyone. "Bharna hai to bhar warna nikal", heard that a lot of times. As if they own the customer. What a shame to have such people working in a city like Mumbai. When asked to talk nicely, they come in a group and attack. When asked to call their manager, they say "I am the Manager". Also the locals in the area know not to visit this. Only the busy LBS travellers fill from here. Hopefully this changes.

station_name: Hindustan Petroleum Baxis Singh and Co.
station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Road, Mumbai - Agra National Hwy, next to Kalpana Cinema Hall, Friends Colony, Kurla West, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text: Very disorganised petrol pump. There is no staff to guide where the vehicle should go. When we reached the petrol bunk, Mr. Akhilesh Dubey denied putting petrol for us citing preference for bikes and told us to wait for more than 20 minutes even though the pump was not crowded. Only 1 filling point was operational. What’s the point of running such a large petrol pump and occupying space on the busy road at a prime location when they cannot fulfill requirements on a Tuesday afternoon.

station_name: Hindustan Petroleum Baxis Singh and Co.
station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Road, Mumbai - Agra National Hwy, next to Kalpana Cinema Hall, Friends Colony, Kurla West, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text: for the last 2-3 times that I visited i was denied Air filling by your guys citing some or the other reason and i feel it is intentional.. Last time the person told me that the guy who fills the air is on leave... how come that is a customer's problem, the owner has to deal with it and make some makeshift arrangement... afterall there is a huge team who works at petrol pump.. if you guys are dependant on only 1 guy then you should lock when that person is on leave... disappointing experience....

text: Would not rate it 4 or 5 🌟 because service however is good of the staff, but most of the times there is no fuel n instead of petrol we have to fill r tanks with POWER fuel. Overall except this it would be a good stop for fuel refill. The air pump for filling the tyres never works. It would be good if they service the air compressor first.
